home.title: Salt Horse
home.meta_description:
Salt Horse offers local craft beers, grass-fed beef burgers, and numerous 
vegan choices. It's listed among Time-Out's Best Bars in Edinburgh.

headings.text: Burgers That Don’t Mess About.Smashed. Gone in minutes.

drink.title: Craft Beer, Wine, and Spirits — Salt Horse
drink.meta_description:
We carry a carefully curated and rotating selection of craft beer with 
fourteen lines on draught and over 200 in cans and bottles
text_blocks: CRAFT BEER FOCUSED - WE ARE THE CRAFT BEER BAR OF EDINBURGH
14 ROTATING DRAUGHT LINES
AROUND 200 CANS AND BOTTLES
A SMALL, WELL-FORMED SELECTION OF WINE AND SPIRITS

food.title: Smash Burgers @ Salt Horse -  Meaty, Vegan, Messy — Salt Horse
food.meta_description:
Organic beef smash burgers, chicken, and proper vegan options, all served 
up at Salt Horse, Edinburgh’s laid-back craft beer bar.
text_blocks: Burgers, wings, chips. That’s the focus.
The menu’s small but tight, dry-aged beef, fried chicken sandwichs, proper chips hand cut cooked twice.A few things for sharing. A few for soaking up the next beer. Vegan options that hold their own.
Freshly made. No shortcuts.Breakfast Burgers served all day on the 1st January
For Kitchen Opening Times SeeHere
Our licence prohibits under-18s on the premises.

book.title: BOOK — Salt Horse
book.meta_description: Booking optional, we always hold space for walk-ins
text_blocks: WALK IN ONLY ON THE 31st December and 1st January
WE RESERVE HALF THE SPACE FOR WALK-INS.WALK-IN ONLY AFTER THE KITCHEN CLOSES.SEEHEREFOR ALL OPENING TIMES
For group bookings over 6, call 07400 653295. We can't assure multiple booked tables will be next to each other, contact us for help.
Garden seating is first-come, first-served and cannot be reserved.
Tables are reserved for 10 minutes. Call if delayed.
Our licence prohibits under-18s on the premises.
BOOKINGS

game.title: Game — Salt Horse
text_blocks: #game-container { text-align: center; margin-top: 50px; } #pint-glass { width: 100px; height: 200px; border: 5px solid #000; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; } #beer-fill { width: 100%; height: 0%; background-color: #FFD700; position: absolute; bottom: 0; } #stop-button { margin-top: 20px; padding: 10px 20px; background-color: #000; color: #fff; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 5px; } #result { margin-top: 20px; font-size: 18px; } let fillInterval; let fillPercentage = 0; function startFilling() { fillInterval = setInterval(() => { fillPercentage += 1; document.getElementById('beer-fill').style.height = fillPercentage + '%'; if (fillPercentage >= 100) { clearInterval(fillInterval); document.getElementById('result').innerText = "You spilled it!"; } }, 100); // Adjust the speed as necessary } document.getElementById('stop-button').addEventListener('click', function () { clearInterval(fillInterval); if (fillPercentage === 100) { document.getElementById('result').innerText = "Perfect pint!"; } else { document.getElementById('result').innerText = `You stopped at ${fillPercentage}%. Try again!`; } }); startFilling(); // Start filling automatically when the page loads

Try again!`; } }); startFilling(); // Start filling automatically when the page loads

butterbeer.title: WE DO NOT SELL BUTTERBEER — Salt Horse
text_blocks: We do not sell butter beer.But we do sell lager, saisons, rustic farmhouse ales, doppelbocks, West Coast IPAs, hazy doubles, New England IPAs, Belgian quads, tripels, dubbels, Patersbiers, pale ales, Australian pales, New Zealand pales, tropical pales, hefeweizens, weissbiers, kellerbiers, smoked lagers, rauchbiers, Marzens, dunkels, altbiers, helles lagers, export lagers, Czech pilsners, German-style pilsners, amber ales, spiced ambers, imperial stouts, breakfast stouts, nitro porters, coffee porters, fruited lambics, krieks, raspberry lambics, peach lambics, cherry & black pepper lambics, Oude Geuzes, Oude Geuze cuvées, blended oak-aged lambics, dry-hopped sours, berry sours, cherry sours, lemon sours, mango gose, golden sours, framboise-style sours, mixed-fermentation sours, radlers, wild ales, barrel-aged wild ales, fresh-hop blends, Bretted pales, session IPAs, and a generous selection of sharers, fruit ciders, perries, rosé ciders, and other things you would expect, but no butterbeer.
butterbeer.raw_text:
We do not sell butter beer.
But we do sell lager, saisons, rustic farmhouse ales, doppelbocks, West Coast IPAs, hazy doubles, New England IPAs, Belgian quads, tripels, dubbels, Patersbiers, pale ales, Australian pales, New Zealand pales, tropical pales, hefeweizens, weissbiers, kellerbiers, smoked lagers, rauchbiers, Marzens, dunkels, altbiers, helles lagers, export lagers, Czech pilsners, German-style pilsners, amber ales, spiced ambers, imperial stouts, breakfast stouts, nitro porters, coffee porters, fruited lambics, krieks, raspberry lambics, peach lambics, cherry & black pepper lambics, Oude Geuzes, Oude Geuze cuvées, blended oak-aged lambics, dry-hopped sours, berry sours, cherry sours, lemon sours, mango gose, golden sours, framboise-style sours, mixed-fermentation sours, radlers, wild ales, barrel-aged wild ales, fresh-hop blends, Bretted pales, session IPAs, and a generous selection of sharers, fruit ciders, perries, rosé ciders, and other things you would expect, but no butterbeer.

og_tags.og:title: WE DO NOT SELL BUTTERBEER — Salt Horse
